summary: Iteration 3 (SEO + Blog + i18n) fully passing. Backend: 15/15 pytest passing — added 5 new tests (blog list w/ 4 seeded slugs & body_html excluded, blog get single w/ body_html, unknown slug 404, /robots.txt with Disallow /admin + Sitemap:, /sitemap.xml valid urlset containing /blog + all 4 slugs). Frontend: all 5 JSON-LD scripts present on landing with correct @types (Organization, WebSite, ProfessionalService w/ Offer 3999 INR, FAQPage w/ 5 Q&A, BreadcrumbList). OG/Twitter/canonical/hreflang meta all present. BlogSection renders between Roadmap and Contact with 4 cards visible. /blog page renders with data-testid=blog-page and case study cards. /blog/wholesale-tea-3x-sales renders blog-post-page/title/body(.prose-avero)/demo/cta — CTA linked to /#contact, demo linked to kuber-enterprise-tea.vercel.app. Article JSON-LD (blog-post-jsonld) injected with headline+@type=Article+datePublished. Unknown slug shows 'Post not found'. i18n: EN/HI toggle switches hero h1 to Devanagari, sets documentElement.lang=hi and localStorage avero_lang=hi. Mobile (390x844): hamburger opens drawer containing Blog nav link + language toggle + mobile bottom CTA bar visible.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py still >300 lines but well-organized; consider splitting into routers/ (blog, admin, chat) if it grows further.
sitemap.xml still hardcodes https://theavero.dev — acceptable for production canonical, but preview URL diverges. Not a bug.
Landing.jsx directly injects <script> JSON-LD into <head> at runtime — works, but consider using react-helmet-async for cleaner SSR-friendly meta management (non-blocking).
seed_data_creation: 1 TEST_ enquiry created via existing test (patched to status=contacted). 4 blog posts idempotently seeded on backend startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 verified: SEO artifacts (robots.txt, sitemap.xml, 5 JSON-LD + Article JSON-LD, OG/Twitter/canonical/hreflang), 4 blog posts (backend + list + detail + landing preview + /blog + /blog/:slug + not-found state + prose-avero styling), and i18n EN/HI toggle (persists via localStorage 'avero_lang', updates documentElement.lang). All 15 backend pytest tests passing.
